decks.notes: The focus of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence using aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. By utilizing the abilities of Slimefoot and Squee, the deck aims to apply pressure on the opponent early in the game and maintain a steady stream of threats. With a mix of small creatures like Elves and powerful cards like Demonic Tutor and Survival of the Fittest, the deck can adapt to different situations and generate card advantage. Additionally, cards like Goblin Bombardment and Animate Dead provide ways to maximize the value of creatures entering the battlefield or in the graveyard. Overall, the deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and resilient aggro strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a variety of counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive cards to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect your own. Tasigur, the Golden Fang provides card advantage and a solid late-game threat. The deck includes a selection of versatile spells like Demonic Tutor, Counterspell, and Toxic Deluge to deal with a wide range of threats. The deck also includes cards like Opposition Agent and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's game plan and stay ahead in resources. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent by efficiently controlling the game and setting up powerful plays.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay using the "Partner" mechanic, allowing two commanders to work together to apply pressure on the opponent. The deck includes a mix of efficient creatures, removal spells, and powerful planeswalkers to control the board and maintain a strong offensive presence. By combining the colors of White, Blue, Black, Red, and Green, the deck is able to access a wide range of versatile cards to adapt to different situations and outmaneuver the opponent. The commanders, Michelangelo and Leonardo, offer a unique strategic advantage with their abilities, allowing for flexible and dynamic gameplay that can overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures, disruption, and card advantage.

This deck focuses on generating a large number of tokens quickly and efficiently to overwhelm the opponent. Prossh, Skyraider of Kher serves as the commander, creating Kobold tokens whenever he enters the battlefield or attacks. The deck includes various ramp cards such as Llanowar Elves and Birds of Paradise to accelerate mana production. Key combo pieces like Goblin Bombardment and Purphoros, God of the Forge allow for dealing direct damage as tokens enter the battlefield. Other cards like Craterhoof Behemoth provide a massive power boost to the tokens, while cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician offer card draw and removal options. The overall strategy revolves around creating a wide board presence and utilizing the tokens for aggressive plays and lethal combos.

This deck focuses on utilizing Lier, Disciple of the Drowned as the commander to cast spells from the graveyard and control the game tempo. The deck includes a high number of counter spells and card draw spells to control the board and maintain card advantage. The key strategy is to outmaneuver opponents by countering their spells, drawing cards, and leveraging the graveyard to recast key spells. With a focus on instant speed interaction and card advantage, the deck aims to disrupt opponents while maintaining a steady stream of spells to put pressure on the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to be reactive and adaptive, making the most out of each spell cast to secure victory.

The deck focuses on using a combination of efficient creatures and powerful enchantments to create a strong board presence and protect the commander, Light-Paws, Emperor's Voice. The deck utilizes a variety of low-cost enchantments to buff creatures, provide protection, and disrupt opponents' strategies. It includes cards like Mother of Runes and Giver of Runes to protect key creatures, while cards like Ethereal Armor and Daybreak Coronet buff them up. The deck also includes interaction spells like Swords to Plowshares and Silence to control the board and prevent opponents from interfering with the combo strategy. Overall, the deck aims to build a powerful board state and set up a winning combo with its commander.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells while utilizing the powerful abilities of Spider-Man 2099 as the commander. The deck focuses on a mix of efficient creatures, burn spells, and countermagic to control the board and deal damage quickly. It also includes various card draw and library manipulation spells to ensure consistency and maintain pressure on the opponent. Overall, the key strategy is to establish early board presence, disrupt the opponent's game plan with countermagic, and close out the game with efficient beatdown creatures and direct damage spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing the aggression and synergy between the partner commanders, Kraum and Yoshimaru, in combination with a wide array of powerful creatures and spells, to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck includes a mix of efficient creatures like Adeline, Resplendent Cathar, along with disruptive elements like Drannith Magistrate and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben to control the board and keep the pressure on. With a strong mana base and powerful spells like Swords to Plowshares and Embercleave, the deck aims to establish an early advantage and maintain it through efficient removal, disruption, and powerful threats to secure a victory before the opponent can establish their own game plan.
